pageContext.name: The Mandalorian 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Sideshow and New Zealand Mint are proud to present the limited-edition Mandalorian Poster Coin Collection. Join the way of the Mandalore with New Zealand Mint's first release in the new silver Star Wars™ collectible Coin Series for the hit Lucasfilm series The Mandalorian™!  This one-of-a-kind Sideshow Exclusive coin features the legendary bounty hunter, Din Djarin™ (more popularly known as The Mandalorian™) displaying strength and resilience as he pushes his way forward despite the heavy baggage on his shoulders– including the adorable yet mischievous Grogu™!  The engraved phrase 'This is more than I signed up for' sits alongside the Mandalorian's Mudhorn signet – both perfectly complementing this colored image. The addition of an engraved masthead rounds off the coin design. In contrast, the obverse simply shows the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, to confirm it as a legal tender coin.   Only 2,000 will be made, don't miss your chance to own The Mandalorian 1oz Silver Coin.
